properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA256 signing secret for JWT tokens. Must decode to at least 32 bytes (256 bits) for HS256. Replace with a cryptographically secure random value in production.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token validity duration in milliseconds. Default is 86400000 (24 hours).

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of origins allowed to make cross-origin requests to the API. Example: http://localhost:3000,https://yourapp.com. Injected into SecurityConfig.corsConfigurationSource().

properties.name: app.oauth2.redirect-uri
properties.description: Frontend URL to redirect to after a successful Google OAuth2 login. The generated JWT is appended as a '?token=<JWT>' query parameter.
